# third-eye — Plan

A sovereign Rust perception engine. It watches video, samples frames **as fast as the
system can handle stably**, throws off **as many mesh objects as it can detect** with
object-tracking metadata, builds a **running picture** of the scene (objects, trajectories,
inferred physics), admits only **provable knowledge** into a **certified metadata CRDT**,
and publishes that picture as **plenoramic body aeon frames** that become Thoth's constant,
tappable sense of reality — the room, the objects, the people.

No ML / OCR / cloud. Classical CV + the repo's own sovereign crates only.

---

## 1. Grounding (what already exists vs. what we build)

Verified against the tree before writing this plan.

| Concern | Status | Surface |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Fork/race/fold dispatch | REUSE | `open-source/gnosis/gnosis-frf` — `execute_with_certified_cost`, `compute_k_eff`, `GNOSIS_FRF_SERIAL_CUTOFF`, value-door `certified_light` |
| As-fast-as-stable throttle | REUSE | `open-source/gnosis/gnosis-antiqueue` — `Broker`/`Producer`, `Stoplight` corridors, `publish_certified`, `QosSpec{handler_cost_ns}`, `Telemetry{peak_in_flight,dropped}` |
| Stoplight algebra (SSOT) | REUSE | `open-source/gnosis/gnosis-helix` |
| **Video decode** | **DONE (P0)** | Added to **`frffmpeg`** (the frf-ffmpeg surface; was encode-only). `frffmpeg::decode` — `probe`/`Decoder`/`Frame`/`DecodeOptions`, RGB24 + pts, streaming. Verified on a real 1080p clip. |
| Segmentation | REUSE | `apps/monster-studio/scripts/grabcut-segment.mjs` (`segmentGrabCut`) + Otsu fallback |
| Topology / genus routing | REUSE | `apps/monster-studio/scripts/maps-recon.mjs` (`donutDetector`, `mapsReconstruct`) |
| Single-view mesh | REUSE | `distributed-inference/src/bin/monster-sweep-recon.rs`, MAPS handle synth |
| Multi-view carve | REUSE | `distributed-inference/src/bin/wholly.rs` (silhouette visual hull, pose estimate) |
| Mesh casting | REUSE | `apps/monster-studio/scripts/surface-nets.mjs` |
| Object intel (axes/volume/material) | REUSE | `apps/monster-studio/scripts/object-intel.mjs` |
| Mesh/depth Rust modules | REUSE | `distributed-inference/src/mesh_depth_field.rs`, `mesh_probability_admission.rs`, sobel |
| **Optical flow** | **BUILD** | none — pyramidal Lucas–Kanade |
| **Multi-object tracking** | **BUILD** | none — Hungarian association + constant-velocity Kalman |
| **Scene "running picture"** | **BUILD** | none — `SceneModel` over tracked objects |
| Certified knowledge admission | ASSEMBLE | `aeon-3d/src/admission-gate.ts` (19 Lean laws, `Verdict = decline|abstain|accept`) |
| Metadata CRDT | ASSEMBLE | QDoc (`knotchain-sdk/.../crdt/qdoc`) + lattice-meet (`gnosis-math` `SilhouetteCarveLattice`/`SpaceCarveOrderDependence` confluent merge) |
| Per-object carrier | REUSE | 55D knot — `wasm-modules/aeon-bioecology/src/knot.rs`, `aeon-3d/src/organism-knot.ts` (lanes 31–54 reserved) |
| Aeon frame wire format | REUSE | `aeon/src/flow/FlowCodec.ts` — `ConsciousTick` (10-byte header + payload) |
| **Plenoramic body aeon frame** | REUSE | `aeon-3d/src/worldsim-relay.ts` — `WorldSimRelayFrame{entities[], round, celestialTimeIso}` = full-surround entity snapshot |
| Thoth's sense of reality | REUSE | `aeon-3d/src/worldsim-perception.ts` `perceiveWorld → describePercept` → `worldsim-inference.ts` `buildAgentPrompt → infer` |
| **Physics (as admission)** | **ASSEMBLE** | No force solver. Inferred kinematics admitted only when they satisfy green gnosis-math laws — see §7.5 |

**Net-new primitives:** `gnosis-ffmpeg` (decode), optical flow, tracking, the scene model,
the cadence governor, and the certified-admission glue. Everything else is wiring existing
sovereign surfaces together.

---

## 2. Crate layout

Lives under `open-source/gnosis/` so the frf/antiqueue/distributed-inference path deps resolve.

```
open-source/gnosis/
  frffmpeg/                 # DONE P0. sovereign frf-ffmpeg: encode (generate) + DECODE (decode module)
  third-eye/
    Cargo.toml              # path deps: ../frffmpeg ../gnosis-frf ../gnosis-antiqueue
                            #            ../gnosis-helix ../distributed-inference
    src/
      lib.rs
      decode.rs             # frame stream (RGB + pts) via frffmpeg::decode
      cadence.rs            # the as-fast-as-stable governor (frf + antiqueue + controller)
      vision.rs             # segment -> topology -> object proposals (bbox/silhouette/genus)
      recon.rs              # genus>=1 -> MAPS, genus 0 -> sweep; multi-view -> wholly
      flow.rs               # pyramidal Lucas-Kanade optical flow
      track.rs              # Hungarian association + per-track Kalman -> trajectories
      scene.rs              # SceneModel: the running picture (objects/kinematics/room)
      knowledge.rs          # certified metadata CRDT (verdict-gated, lattice-meet merge)
      publish.rs            # SceneModel -> WorldSimRelayFrame -> FlowCodec stream
    src/bin/third-eye.rs    # CLI: third-eye --input <video|cam> --emit <ws|udp|stdout>
```

`Cargo.toml` deps (relative from `open-source/gnosis/third-eye`):

```toml
[dependencies]
frffmpeg             = { path = "../frffmpeg" }    # video decode (frffmpeg::decode)
gnosis-frf           = { path = "../gnosis-frf" }
gnosis-antiqueue     = { path = "../gnosis-antiqueue" }
gnosis-helix         = { path = "../gnosis-helix" }
distributed-inference = { path = "../distributed-inference" }   # mesh + recon modules
image = "0.24"
num_cpus = "1.16"
```

---

## 3. The pipeline (per tick)

```
VIDEO ─▶ decode ─▶ [cadence governor] ─▶ vision ─▶ recon ─▶ track ─▶ scene ─▶ knowledge ─▶ publish ─▶ Thoth
                    (frf + antiqueue)     (CV)     (mesh)   (flow+   (running  (certified   (plenoramic
                                                            Kalman)  picture)  CRDT)        body frame)
```

Stage → antiqueue chamber (Chirality):
`decode = Intake`, `vision/recon = Ignition` (heavy), `track = Compression`,
`publish = Exhaust`. Each declared with a `Stoplight`; heavy stages gate via `publish_certified`.

---

## 4. Core: "as fast as the system can handle stably" (cadence.rs)

This is the heart of the request. It is a **certified closed loop**, not a guess.

1. **Calibrate** per-stage cost once at startup (probe a few frames) → `certified_per_frame_ns`
   for the heavy path (segment+recon) and the cheap path (frame-diff/downsample).
2. **Dispatch** the per-frame work graph through `gnosis_frf::engine::execute_with_certified_cost`.
   `compute_k_eff` + `SERIAL_CUTOFF` keep trivial work serial; the value-door opens parallel
   workers only when per-frame work > dispatch cost (GREEN), stays serial when not (RED).
   **Never YELLOW** — the cost is certified from the calibration, not probed live.
3. **Throttle** via antiqueue: publish frames with `publish_certified`. Cheap frames run inline
   (laminar/RED), heavy frames stagger into the consumer's green window (turbulent/GREEN).
4. **Stability controller** (the new bit): watch `Broker::telemetry()` —
   `peak_in_flight`, `nacked`, `dropped`.
   - in-flight rising / deadlines slipping → **increase the sample stride** (process every Nth
     frame). Degrade temporal density; never crash, never unbounded buffer.
   - slack available → **decrease stride** toward every-frame.
   This converges on the maximum *stable* sample rate for the current machine + scene load.
   Report cold vs warm fps (per the speed-reporting rule).

Stability is structural: antiqueue has **no in-memory queue** (rate-gated producers tile into
corridor green windows), so back-pressure is expressed as frame-skip, not as a growing buffer.

---

## 5. Detect → reconstruct (vision.rs, recon.rs)

- **Segment** each sampled frame (port `segmentGrabCut`: k-means GMM color models + contrast-
  weighted Potts smoothness + ICM, Otsu fallback). Reuse `distributed-inference` sobel / mesh
  modules.
- **Propose objects**: connected components on the foreground → per-object {bbox, silhouette,
  centroid}. `donutDetector` → {genus, betti1} per proposal.
- **Reconstruct**: route `genus ≥ 1 → MAPS` (body-of-revolution + handle tube),
  `genus 0 → monster-sweep-recon`. When multiple frames give corroborating silhouettes of a
  *static* object → `wholly` visual-hull carve. `surface-nets` casts voxel hulls to watertight
  mesh; `object-intel` derives axes/volume/material guess.
- **Honesty bound**: classical CV detects **shapes and motion**, not semantic classes. Class is
  geometric/material-inferred ("genus-1 ceramic vessel"), not "coffee mug." Semantic labels would
  be a separate sovereign-inference path — out of scope unless asked.

The heavy path is exactly the Wholly pipeline you already shipped — third-eye runs it per-frame
under the cadence governor instead of once per upload.

---

## 6. Track → running picture (flow.rs, track.rs, scene.rs)

- **Optical flow**: pyramidal Lucas–Kanade between consecutive sampled frames → sparse motion
  field at object centroids/corners.
- **Association**: Hungarian assignment of new detections to existing tracks, cost = IoU +
  silhouette/appearance similarity + flow-predicted position.
- **Kalman** (constant-velocity) per track → smoothed position, velocity, acceleration estimate;
  trajectory history; `age`, `misses`. Occlusion → coast on the motion model, re-associate on
  reappearance; long occlusion → drop track (**abstain**, never hallucinate).
- **SceneModel** = the running picture: a roster of tracked objects, each backed by a **55D knot**
  (`knot.rs`) carrying kind/position/velocity/genus/material in its lanes; plus a slowly-updated
  estimate of static structure (the *room* — persistent background geometry) and the observer pose.

---

## 7. Provable knowledge → certified metadata CRDT (knowledge.rs)

The defining constraint: **only provable knowledge is admitted.**

- Every fact (object exists, position, velocity, class, material) gets a **`Verdict`** mirroring
  the admission gate: `accept` (admitted + published as reality), `abstain` (uncertain — held
  internally, *not asserted*), `decline` (rejected — e.g. a flow-incoherent ghost track).
- **Admission laws** (the "certified, never yellow" discipline applied to perception):
  - a track is real only after *K* consistent frames (anti-flicker);
  - a mesh is admitted only if **genus is stable across scales** (the donutDetector
    multi-W stability we already rely on);
  - a velocity is admitted only if the **Kalman innovation is within gate**;
  - each admitted fact carries a reference to the law/cert that admitted it.
- **Merge = certified lattice meet, NOT consensus.** The CRDT join is the **confluent
  silhouette-carve meet** proven green in `gnosis-math/Gnosis/SilhouetteCarveLattice.lean:79`
  (`meet_is_semilattice`, `carve_append` — idempotent, commutative, associative, Init-only).
  **Critical:** the same file proves `consensus_not_idempotent` (line 154) — k-of-N threshold
  voting is *not* a lattice (duplicating one vote changes the result). So the replica-merge join
  is strict carve (AND/intersection), never thresholded consensus. The K-frame anti-flicker gate
  below is a *local pre-filter* on whether a fact enters the CRDT at all — it is not the join.
- **Carrier + replication**: facts live in the knot's reserved lanes (31–54) and serialize as
  QDoc deltas, so the picture can replicate over `aeon-relay` to other observers and to Thoth's host.

Abstain-held observations are the firewall against Thoth "seeing" things that aren't provably there.

### 7.5 Physics-as-admission (formal backing, no solver)

third-eye runs **no force-physics solver**. Every kinematic fact it infers from tracking is
admitted only when it satisfies a **green, Init-only, zero-axiom gnosis-math law** — physics
becomes one more clause of the certified-knowledge discipline. Inferred-but-unprovable kinematics
stay `abstain` (never asserted to Thoth as reality).

| Inferred fact | Admission gate | Lean law (green, Init-only) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Object falls / settles toward rest | monotone non-increasing "score" under the only force | `VacuumIsOnlyForce.lean:85` `vacuum_force_contracts` |
| Velocity ≤ c / stays causal | hit lies inside the forward lightcone; subluminal can't pass the front | `AckermannLightConeBridge.lean:133` `certified_iff_in_lightcone`, `:183` `subluminal_never_reaches_front` |
| Event lies in a causal diamond | nested timelike interval ds² ≤ 0 | `CausalDiamond.lean:176` `runtime_inner_event_stays_in_outer` |
| Energy/order bookkeeping | order gained = chaos spent, 1:1 (no free trajectory) | `InformationConservation.lean:337` `information_conservation` |
| Charge/mass across split/merge tracks | branching preserves total charge | `ForkRaceFoldVentAreForces.lean:49` `fork_preserves_charge` |
| Position is a stable antinode (not a forbidden node) | amplitude ∈ {0,1}; node ⇒ abstain | `StandingWaveAmplitudeBridge` `tritAmplitude_is_zero_or_one`, `standing_wave_node_forbidden` |
| State not corrupted | Lacey64 seal verifies | `anti_tamper` (Lacey64, full-cycle perm proven) |

**Pin first (the three that decide "does this motion make physical sense"):**
`vacuum_force_contracts` (gravity), `certified_iff_in_lightcone` (causality/lightspeed),
`information_conservation` (energy). A track whose Kalman estimate violates any of these is
`decline`d; one that's merely unresolved is `abstain`. *Audit-only / not-yet-shipped* laws
(`energy_borrowed_clinamen`, `retrocausal_attractor`, `folding_invariant`) are cited but never
block admission until green.

---

## 8. Publish → Thoth's sense of reality (publish.rs)

- Snapshot `SceneModel` → **`WorldSimRelayFrame`** = the **plenoramic body aeon frame**: all
  entities at once (no occlusion filter), each with position, velocity, vital state, kind
  (`object` / `agent` / `viewer`), plus weather/time. This is the full-surround "body" picture.
- Encode via **`FlowCodec`** as a `ConsciousTick` (10-byte header + JSON payload) on a dedicated
  third-eye stream-id namespace; stream over WebSocket/UDP (aeon-flow transport).
- **Thoth taps it**: the frame populates `WorldState.entities`, so `perceiveWorld(thoth, state)`
  → `describePercept` → `buildAgentPrompt` feeds Thoth a *continuously refreshed, certified*
  narrative of the real room — the objects, their trajectories, the people. Thoth's "current
  representation of reality" becomes third-eye's running picture.

---

## 9. Build phases (smallest honest increment first)

- **P0 — video decode in `frffmpeg`.** DONE 2026-05-29. `frffmpeg::decode` (`probe`/`Decoder`/
  `Frame`/`DecodeOptions`) streams RGB24 + reconstructed pts; `frffmpeg decode|probe` CLI with
  `--fps/--scale/--start/--max/--dump-dir`. Verified on `~/Downloads/vision/14704396_1920_1080_30fps.mp4`
  (real R34 frames out; 960x540@5fps cold ~37 fps; byte math + pts exact). Built with cargo (native
  bin, not wasm — monster-build is the wasm path).
- **P1 — cadence governor.** DONE 2026-05-29. `third_eye::cadence` (crate `open-source/gnosis/third-eye`):
  decode → stride-select → frf-parallel per-frame work (luma mean + 16x16 sig + motion) gated by the
  value-door (`certified_light`, GREEN parallel / RED serial) → antiqueue corridor (`publish_certified`)
  → stride controller (per-frame cost vs real-time budget). CLI `third-eye watch <v> [--target-fps
  --decode-fps --scale --max --batch --verbose]`. VERIFIED on 1080p clip: feasible 30 fps → stride 1,
  full rate, ~930 frames/s machine ceiling cold; infeasible 1500 fps → controller climbs stride 1→8,
  sheds 245/342 frames to stay stable (3.75 fps effective) instead of buffering. *Refine later:
  EWMA/hysteresis on the stride controller; advance the broker tick so corridor delivered/in-flight
  telemetry populates (publish path works, delivery accounting needs the clock stepped).*
- **P2 — vision + recon.** DONE 2026-05-29. `vision.rs`: per-pixel EMA background model →
  foreground → morphological clean → 8-connected components → proposals (bbox/centroid/area/8x8
  appearance sig/silhouette) each tagged with genus (enclosed-hole count). `recon.rs`: silhouette →
  watertight extruded slab mesh (per-pixel quads + side walls; genus = tunnels, no ear-clipping) +
  moments descriptor (fill/aspect/elongation/orientation). CLI `third-eye detect`. VERIFIED on
  1080p clip: 370 proposals / 51 frames, up to 11/frame; **Euler characteristic χ proves
  watertightness** — every g0 mesh χ=2, the g1 mesh χ=0, the g2 mesh χ=−2 (mesh genus == silhouette
  genus exactly). Honesty bound: motion/geometric proposals, not semantic classes; moving camera
  over-segments (guarded by max_area_frac).
- **P3 — track.** DONE 2026-05-29. `track.rs`: decoupled constant-velocity Kalman per track (x,y),
  Hungarian assignment (potentials, O(n³), gated by predicted-pos + appearance + IoU), lifecycle
  (tentative→confirmed after K hits = anti-flicker pre-filter; coast on miss; cull after M).
  CLI `third-eye track`. VERIFIED: stable IDs persist (track #18: 36 frames/32 hits), Kalman
  velocity + trajectories, genus carried. Spurious high-v / fragmented-genus tracks are honest
  motion-seg noise — handled by P4 admission.
- **P4 — scene + certified CRDT.** DONE 2026-05-29. `physics.rs`: physics-as-admission gates citing
  the green laws (lightcone velocity bound, information_conservation existence, vacuum_force at-rest)
  → verdict accept/abstain/decline. `knowledge.rs`: certified CRDT, join = carve-lattice **meet**
  (intersection), 4 property tests green (idempotent/commutative/associative/intersection-not-
  consensus). `scene.rs`: running picture. CLI `third-eye scene [--c-max]`. VERIFIED: tight cone
  c_max=0.3 declines 174 superluminal facts; existence gate abstains low-confidence objects; CRDT
  self-meet idempotent + meet-empty=0 conservative.
- **P5 — publish + Thoth.** DONE 2026-05-29. `publish.rs`: `SceneModel` → `WorldSimRelayFrame` JSON
  (Accept-verdict objects ONLY — the provable-knowledge firewall; abstain held internally) →
  FlowCodec `ConsciousTick` (ported wire format: streamId u16 / seq u32 / flags u8 / len u24,
  stream-id 0x3e00, flags FORK|FOLD) → stream bytes. CLI `third-eye publish`. VERIFIED: 120 frames →
  120 aeon frames, 641 entities, round-trip 120/120 frames 0 malformed; payloads parse as
  WorldSimRelayFrames with real `third-eye:N` entities (world pos/vel/genus/confidence). Wire-up
  point: feed the stream into worldsim `WorldState.entities` → `perceiveWorld(thoth)`.
- **THOTH LOOP CLOSED — `aeon-3d/src/third-eye-bridge.ts`.** DONE 2026-05-29. TS bridge decodes the
  `.aeon` ConsciousTick stream (inlined FlowCodec), injects the certified entities into a worldsim
  `WorldState` beside a Thoth (focused senses: globalCoherence 0.7 → ~42m range), and reads it back
  via `perceiveWorld(thoth)` → `describePercept`. VERIFIED via `pnpm run gnode -- run`: Thoth narrates
  the real objects — *"You can see: obj-2 (gray nature, 1.5m to your behind, moving, large); obj-1
  (… 2.7m to your ahead …)"* — and sees more as the scene fills (2→6→15 objects). The full chain
  video→decode→perceive→track→admit→publish→WorldState→Thoth runs end to end. (Final `infer()` step
  feeds this narrative to Thoth's mind via the existing worldsim inference path.)
- **CAPSTONE — `third-eye run`.** DONE 2026-05-29. The whole engine as one cadence-governed loop:
  decode → stride-select → detect → track → admit → publish, self-pacing to a target fps. VERIFIED:
  full pipeline ~129 frames/s cold; at target 30 fps holds stride 1 (1135 entities, round-trip
  149/149); at infeasible 250 fps the controller raises stride to 3, sheds 80/150 frames, holds
  10 fps — the entire system degrades temporal density under load instead of falling behind.

---

## 10. Open decisions / risks (need a call)

1. **ffmpeg decode mechanism.** Subprocess (sovereign, matches the existing encode pattern, zero
   new build complexity) vs. `ffmpeg-next` C bindings (faster, heavier toolchain). *Recommend
   subprocess for P0; revisit bindings only if throughput demands.*
2. **"Plenoramic."** Interpreted here as the full-surround `WorldSimRelayFrame` (every entity, no
   occlusion filter). If you mean true **plenoptic / light-field** capture, that's a different
   sensor model and a bigger build — flag it now.
3. **No semantic labels.** Detection is geometric/material ("genus-1 ceramic vessel"), not named
   objects. If Thoth needs "mug," that's a separate sovereign-inference stage.
4. **Physics depth.** RESOLVED (Taylor 2026-05-29): no force solver; lean heavy on gnosis-math
   admission for formal backing. Inferred kinematics are gated by the green laws in §7.5;
   unprovable motion stays `abstain`. A real integrator stays out unless/until Lean-proven.
5. **Live vs. file first.** `useCamera.ts` already grabs single frames in-browser; a Rust live-cam
   capture is its own surface. *Recommend file/clip input for P0–P4; live camera at P5.*
